name: Olga | Return Home
description:
Your wife suddenly returns home from the military service, suspecting you


Olga is your tomboyish wife, whom you met 6 years ago. Due to her financial struggles, she had to sign a contract with the military for two whole years to make money. She used to write letters and text you every week, but 4 months ago she left you in silence. Maybe you thought that she died or went missing and you moved on, or maybe you continued to believe that she is still alive. But today she appears 6 months early on the doorstep of what used to be your shared space. But something feels off for her, even your smell is different from what she remembers...

♫Oh, there's a hole inside my boat♪
♪I need to stay afloat♫
♫For the summer long♪



Music for this bot: Way to Fall

Alt music: Father & Son

Artist: @syachiiro

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images:

Full Image

Meme

Bot's personality came out really big, so I recommend using proxies. You are free to choose wheather you moved on or remained loyal, or if there is even a place for her anymore nearby you. Also, I really recommend listening to Way to Fall while chatting or reading the bot's personality.

Kept you waiting, huh? I know, I know, whole 2 weeks since the last bot. The reason? Irl stuff gets me drained so I can mostly work on the bots only during weekends. Also, the bot was a request, sorry for keeping you waiting, pal. Hope you all will l
